mapper.select: SELECT faq_ctgry_oid, ctgry_nm, sort_seq, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.faq_ctgry WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_seq, faq_ctgry_oid

SELECT f.faq_dtl_oid, f.faq_ctgry_oid, c.ctgry_nm, f.qstn_cn, f.ans_cn, f.ans_cn_txt, f.sort_seq, f.open_yn, f.use_yn, f.inq_cnt, f.reg_id, f.reg_dt, f.mdfcn_id, f.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.faq_dtl f LEFT JOIN ${schema}.faq_ctgry c ON f.faq_ctgry_oid = c.faq_ctgry_oid WHERE f.faq_dtl_oid = #{faqDtlOid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.faq_dtl
faq_ctgry_oid = #{faqCtgryOid},
qstn_cn = #{qstnCn},
ans_cn = #{ansCn},
ans_cn_txt = #{ansCnTxt},
sort_seq = #{sortSeq},
open_yn = #{openYn},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW(), use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE faq_dtl_oid = #{faqDtlOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.faq_dtl SET use_yn = 'N' , mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE faq_dtl_oid IN
#{faqDtlOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.faq_dtl
faq_ctgry_oid = #{faqCtgryOid},
qstn_cn = #{qstnCn},
ans_cn = #{ansCn},
ans_cn_txt = #{ansCnTxt},
sort_seq = #{sortSeq},
open_yn = #{openYn},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW(), use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE faq_dtl_oid = #{faqDtlOid}
